appliedUpdates.description: Documented that `.dev/` is gitignored and repo-cleanup archive validation must inspect on-disk `.dev/` state and handoff evidence, not just `git diff`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update `implementation-worker` to explicitly handle cleanup/archive-only tasks instead of implying every assignment follows a Rust/TDD/test-first loop with cargo validators.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The repo-cleanup-artifacts and repo-cleanup-fix reviews both observed that cleanup-only work had to fit a Rust-centric skill procedure, creating avoidable ambiguity about how to execute and review non-code archive tasks.
